mapper.select:
SELECT uf.id, uf.user_id, uf.topic_id, uf.created_at,
ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages,
ci.question_type, ci.score, ci.DESC, ci.tags FROM user_favorites uf LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = uf.user_id) LEFT JOIN collection_info ci ON (ci.id = uf.topic_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND ci.DESC LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.desc},'%')
AND ci.tags LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.tags},'%')
AND ci.question_type LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.questionType},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC
